name: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc.
sic_description: In Vitro & In Vivo Diagnostic Substances
summary: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. is a molecular diagnostics company focused on cardiovascular disease (CVD) detection using epigenetic and AI-driven technologies. The company offers Epi+Gen CHD and PrecisionCHD, commercially available blood-based tests that leverage DNA methylation biomarkers to assess coronary heart disease risk. Its technology is built on a licensed platform from the University of Iowa Research Foundation and targets patients, healthcare professionals, and other key clinical channels.
